---
title: "Soma S Dhavala"
description: "Personal site of Soma S Dhavala — statistician and applied ML practitioner."
include-before-body: _partials/banner-home.html
toc: false
---

Welcome. This is the landing page.

Browse the nav above for [About](about/), [Research](research/),
[Teaching](teaching/), [Consulting](consulting/), or the [Blog](posts/).
